displayText.headline: The Art of Preventative Longevity
displayText.subheading: Comprehensive screening designed by clinical experts to detect health risks early. Because true luxury is peace of mind.
displayText.footer: Tailored health screenings available across all major Max centers.

style: Warm beige paper texture, elegant editorial serifs, generous white space.
description: A beige-textured workspace visual containing an elegant clinic brochure, a leather-bound notebook, and a gold-nibbed pen. Elegant clinical markers set inside fine black margins.
